name: Neon Reaper Hoodie
description: The Neon Reaper Hoodie is the ultimate statement piece for every gamer. Crafted from heavyweight 380gsm fleece with a candy skull embroidered chest logo, neon pink trim detailing, and a kangaroo pocket big enough for your soul. Machine wash. Preshrunk. Haunt the lobby in style.

name: Skull Drops Mousepad XL
description: Extended XL gaming mousepad with a full-color Dia de los Muertos artwork print covering every millimeter. Micro-woven surface for precision tracking across all DPI settings. Anti-slip rubber base. Stitched neon pink edges. Goes great with the Calavera Keycap Set.

name: Calavera Keycap Set
description: Double-shot PBT keycaps with individual hand-painted candy skull legends. Cherry MX compatible. 137-key full kit includes ISO and ANSI variants. The legends won't fade — unlike your enemies. Works with every 60%, 65%, TKL, and full-size board.

name: Day of the Dead Desk Mat
description: Transform your entire workspace with the Day of the Dead Desk Mat. Vibrant marigold-and-skull artwork printed on premium microfiber. Dual-sided surface — smooth for mouse, textured for wrist comfort. Rolled shipping, no creases. Your ancestors would want this for you.

name: Ghost Rider Tee
description: 100% ring-spun cotton tee with a faded, screen-printed Ghost Rider candy skull graphic. Vintage wash finish gives it that perfectly broken-in look. Unisex cut runs relaxed. Wear it to the tournament or to haunt your local coffee shop.

name: Skull Lord Gaming Chair Cover
description: Universal gaming chair cover with candy skull all-over print. Stretchy spandex-blend fits most racing-style chairs. Machine washable. Neon purple accent piping. You've invested in your chair — now make it look as deadly as your K/D ratio.

name: Neon Skull Poster Set
description: Set of three museum-quality neon skull art prints. Each 250gsm matte poster features a unique Dia de los Muertos design with cyberpunk neon color grading. Rolled in a protective tube. Frame not included. Your setup will never look the same again.

name: RGB Skull Wrist Rest
description: Memory foam wrist rest with a slow-breathing RGB underglow and a debossed candy skull pattern on the leatherette surface. USB-powered, 16 static colors + 4 breathing modes. Anti-slip base. Ergonomic support that slaps as hard as your headshots.
